overview: Mafia is a social deduction game where the town must identify and eliminate the Mafia members before they take over. During the night, Mafia secretly eliminates a player. During the day, everyone discusses and votes to eliminate a suspect.

roles.name: Villager
roles.desc: A regular town member. Use discussion and logic to find the Mafia. Vote wisely during the day.

roles.name: Mafia
roles.desc: You are the villain. During the night, choose a player to eliminate. During the day, blend in and avoid suspicion.

roles.name: Doctor
roles.desc: Each night, choose one player to protect. If the Mafia targets them, they survive. You can protect yourself.

roles.name: Detective
roles.desc: Each night, investigate one player to learn if they are Mafia or not. Use this information carefully during discussions.

phases.name: Night Phase
phases.desc: All players close their eyes. Mafia chooses a target to eliminate. Doctor chooses someone to protect. Detective investigates a player.

phases.name: Result
phases.desc: The results of the night are revealed. If someone was killed (and not saved by the Doctor), they are eliminated.

phases.name: Discussion
phases.desc: All surviving players discuss who they think is Mafia. Share suspicions, alibis, and theories. Time is limited.

phases.name: Voting
phases.desc: Each player votes for who to eliminate, or skips. The player with the most votes is eliminated and their role is revealed.

winConditions: Town wins when all Mafia members are eliminated.
Mafia wins when the number of Mafia equals or exceeds the number of town members.
tips: Pay attention to who defends whom during discussions.
As Detective, be careful when sharing your findings — the Mafia might target you.
As Doctor, try to predict who the Mafia will target.
